title: viola hirta subsp. odorata
intro: Viola hirta subsp. odorata, also known as the fragrant wood violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the violet family that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Viola hirta subsp. odorata is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for use in aromatherapy and as a natural remedy for various health concerns.
